parameters.name: Base Free Flow Speed
parameters.description: Base free flow speed before adjustments

parameters.name: Lane Width
parameters.description: Width of travel lane

parameters.name: Right Lateral Clearance
parameters.description: Lateral clearance on right side of traveled way

parameters.name: Left Lateral Clearance
parameters.description: Lateral clearance on left side of traveled way

parameters.name: Grade
parameters.description: Segment percent grade

parameters.name: Speed Limit
parameters.description: Posted speed limit

parameters.name: Peak Hour Factor
parameters.description: Ratio of hourly volume to peak 15-minute flow rate

parameters.name: Truck Percentage
parameters.description: Proportion of trucks and buses in traffic stream

parameters.name: Access Point Density
parameters.description: Number of access points per mile

parameters.name: Total Ramp Density
parameters.description: Total number of ramps per mile

parameters.name: Lane Count
parameters.description: Number of lanes in analysis direction

parameters.name: Segment Length
parameters.description: Length of analysis segment

parameters.name: Shoulder Width
parameters.description: Width of paved shoulder (Green Book 4.4.2)

parameters.name: Horizontal Class
parameters.description: Horizontal alignment classification (0=tangent to 5=severe curve)

parameters.name: Design Radius
parameters.description: Horizontal curve design radius (Green Book 3.3)

parameters.name: Free Flow Speed
parameters.description: Free-flow speed after lane width, lateral clearance, and ramp density adjustments (HCM Eq. 12-2)

parameters.name: Capacity
parameters.description: Base segment capacity c = 2,200 + 10*(FFS - 50) (HCM Eq. 12-6)

parameters.name: Directional Demand Flow
parameters.description: Demand flow rate for analysis direction i (HCM Eq. 12-9)

parameters.name: Demand Volume
parameters.description: Demand volume converted to flow rate via PHF, lane count, and heavy-vehicle factor (HCM Eq. 12-9)

parameters.name: Space Mean Speed
parameters.description: Space mean speed of the traffic stream from the FFS-anchored speed-flow curve (HCM Eq. 12-1)

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Segment density D = v_p / S; 45 pc/mi/ln is density at capacity (HCM Eq. 12-11)

parameters.name: Volume-to-Capacity Ratio
parameters.description: Ratio of demand flow rate to capacity (HCM Eq. 12-12)

parameters.name: Level of Service
parameters.description: Level of Service assigned by density thresholds; F when demand exceeds capacity (HCM Exhibit 12-15)
